task_completion.visual_evidence: A mask is visible in the Masks panel (usually on the left side of the InVesalius interface) with threshold values appropriate for bone (e.g., min >= 100, max >= 800).
The mask in the Masks panel is explicitly named 'Cranial Bone'.

task_completion.description: Generate a 3D surface from the mask
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D reconstruction of the skull is visible in the 3D viewer pane (usually the bottom right quadrant).
The surface listed in the Surfaces panel (usually below the Masks panel) is explicitly named 'Skull_Model'.

task_completion.description: Change the surface color to Red
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D surface in the 3D viewer is rendered in red, and/or the color swatch next to 'Skull_Model' in the Surfaces panel is red.

task_completion.description: Save the project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The InVesalius main window title bar displays 'organized_project.inv3' or a 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/organized_project.inv3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the InVesalius 3 GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the InVesalius 3 application windows, menus, and panels rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The 3D surface is genuinely rendered by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewer shows a proper 3D rendering of a skull matching the CT data, not a pasted image or mocked interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply create a text file named .inv3.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the 'Save' or 'Save As' functionality within the InVesalius application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is '/home/ga/Documents/organized_project.inv3'. The mask must be named exactly 'Cranial Bone'. The surface must be named exactly 'Skull_Model' and its color must be red. The bone threshold should be roughly min>=100 and max>=800 (InVesalius default for bone is typically 226-3021 HU).
